justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including "in 3 days at 10," "around 9am on Thursday the 4th," "Friday, June 5th, around 9 AM," and "Friday, June 5th, in the morning at all."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to suggest a new time or day, rather than proactively offering alternative slots.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made one slightly redundant API call by checking for "around 9 AM" after the user had already specified "9am on Thursday the 4th."
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and the agent's passive approach to finding alternatives made the conversation feel a bit tiring for the customer.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context throughout the conversation but did not proactively offer alternatives, instead asking the user to suggest new times after each rejection.
